person_name: Macrianus Minor (son of Macrianus Major, usurper under Gallienus, d. 261)
person_name_full: Macrianus Minor (son of Macrianus Major, usurper under Gallienus, d. 261)
notes: Son of Macrianus Major, Roman usurper under Emperor Gallienus, died 261 CE.

docs.title: Life of Tyranni Triginta
docs.author: Historia Augusta (anonymous)
docs.excerpt: … in administering the commonwealth, vehement in counsel, winning fame in campaigns, without an equal in providing for rations, and so highly esteemed by Valerian that in a certain letter he honoured him with the following testimony: 5 "From Valerian to Ragonius Clarus,⁠ 62 prefect of Illyricum
